label: Mammafiore
classificationDetail: Valor column digit misread (26,52 → 25,52) — NOT discount extraction, NOT IVA bleed, NOT row bleed
rootCause: Pass C misreads the Valor column as €25.52 instead of the printed €26.52. Gross unit price (33.154) and discount (20%) are read correctly; the binder then derives unit_price=26.52 from gross×(1−discount) while preserving the wrong line_total_net, producing the observed unit_price > total split.

fieldDiagnosis.digitLossLocation: Valor column — euros digit 6 misread as 5 (26,52 → 25,52)

inferredPassCStructured.method: binder_replay — only input combination that reproduces v30 output exactly

smallestFix.recommendation: Add Farina GOOD/BAD example after Rulo example: '"Farina Speciale pizza 25kg Amoruso" Qtd 1, Pr. Unitário 33,154, Desc. 20,00, IVA 6,00, Valor 26,52 → line_total_net: 26.52 (GOOD) · line_total_net: 25.52 (BAD — digit drift; read Valor 26,52 not 25,52)'. Reinforce digit-by-digit Valor reading on discounted Mammafiore rows where net total is in the 20–30 EUR band.
notRecommended: Binder change (root cause is Pass C OCR)

stabilityAuditFocusRows.answer: YES — Farina is the sole Class A row; fixing recovers €1.00 and eliminates all focus-row Class A bugs

v30FullVLRerun.answer: PARTIAL — removes €1.00 of €28.26 headline Class A; Pomodor €26.72 is GT reclassification (Class C); Rulo Bocconcino €0.54 remains
